description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a wooden stock and foregrip, paired with a dark metallic receiver, barrel, and magazine. The stock and foregrip are a warm, orange-brown wood, providing a traditional aesthetic and likely a comfortable grip. The receiver and barrel are finished in a matte black or dark gray, giving the weapon a utilitarian and robust appearance. The magazine is slightly curved and also dark, suggesting it is detachable and made of metal. Iron sights are visible on the top of the barrel, indicating standard aiming capability. The overall proportions and features are reminiscent of iconic military rifles, suitable for urban environments.
description: A classic rifle with a wooden stock and foregrip, dark metal receiver, barrel, and a curved detachable magazine. Iron sights are mounted on top.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, foregrip, and curved magazine.
description_view_1: Front view showing the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the wooden and metal components and the magazine.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the stock and the slim profile of the rifle.
